summary: invoicetool - An automation that processes vendor invoices and generates payment schedules for small businesses.

pass_1.one_liner: Manual invoice entry and payment schedule generator for small business vendor management
pass_1.target_user_persona: Small business owners and bookkeepers managing vendor payments

pass_2.problem_statement: Small businesses struggle with manual vendor invoice tracking and payment scheduling, leading to missed payments and cash flow issues
pass_2.solution_approach: Manual invoice entry system with rule-based payment schedule generation
pass_2.unique_value_prop: Simple vendor payment organization with predefined scheduling rules

tier_1_core_features: Payment schedule generator with preset rules
must_have_workflows: Generate payment schedule based on terms

pass_4.technical_approach: Static web app with local storage, manual data entry only
pass_4.data_strategy: Hardcoded payment terms templates, manual invoice records
pass_4.complexity_level: Low - form-based data entry with basic calculations

pass_5.launch_strategy: Direct outreach to 10 local small businesses for feedback
pass_5.success_criteria: 5 businesses using it for monthly invoice management

pass_6.next_iteration_potential: Add basic integrations and automated reminders in tier 2

pass_1.one_liner: Manual invoice processing with rule-based payment scheduling for consulting firms
pass_1.target_user: consulting firms, independent consultants, client ops
pass_1.core_problem: Managing multi-entity consulting engagements is messy and fragmented

pass_2.success_metric: First 30 days: track 20 engagements end-to-end with clean client handoffs
non_goals: Do not build a full enterprise suite in phase 1
Avoid custom integrations beyond the listed scope

constraints.brand_positioning: Pragmatic, ops-focused, and measurable outcomes only
constraints.compliance: Follow basic data privacy and access control expectations
constraints.promise_limits: No guarantees beyond the defined scope and data sources
constraints.scale_limits: Designed for early-stage usage, not massive scale in v1

pass_3.shipping_preference: Ship a focused MVP with 2-3 core workflows and expand after validation

pass_6.technical_scope: User accounts with role permissions, persistent database, email integration, calendar sync, accounting export, background job processing
pass_6.validation_approach: Deploy with 3-5 consulting firms, track engagement completion rates and client handoff quality

acceptance_criteria.text: Deliverable Core workflow is implemented and usable.
Deliverable Core workflow is implemented and usable.
